layout_candidates.input_source: RevIN-normalized history x; line raster, top1 period fold, FFT power
layout_candidates.channel_design: 3 semantic views packed into ViT RGB channels
layout_candidates.shortcut_risk: medium: channel mixing may encode dataset-specific view interactions
expected_failure_modes: view semantics not aligned with natural-image pretraining
layout_candidates.estimated_single_layout_feature_cache_ti: 1-1.5h per 35k samples on current P2a-like single-layout cache estimate
layout_candidates.notes: Round1 当前对照口径；用于锚定所有 Round2 layout 改动。

layout_candidates.input_source: same three semantic views as current_rgb_3view
layout_candidates.channel_design: grayscale panels copied or lightly encoded into RGB-compatible tensor
layout_candidates.panel_design: three views arranged as horizontal or vertical spatial panels
layout_candidates.shortcut_risk: medium: panel position and reduced effective resolution may leak layout bias
expected_failure_modes: ViT positional bias to panel location
layout_candidates.estimated_single_layout_feature_cache_ti: 1-1.5h per 35k samples on current P2a-like single-layout cache estimate
layout_candidates.notes: 核心问题是 view separation 是否优于 RGB channel mixing。

layout_candidates.channel_design: single line raster replicated or encoded into ViT-compatible 3 channels
layout_candidates.estimated_single_layout_feature_cache_ti: 1-1.5h per 35k samples on current P2a-like single-layout cache estimate
layout_candidates.notes: 低 shortcut 风险、最可解释的 shape baseline。

layout_candidates.input_source: RevIN-normalized history x and first-difference / rolling local-change signal
layout_candidates.channel_design: line view plus difference/volatility band in RGB-compatible channels or panels
layout_candidates.panel_design: line with auxiliary local-change band, exact packing to freeze in feature-cache step
layout_candidates.shortcut_risk: medium-low: local change can amplify noise but is not a direct dataset id
layout_candidates.estimated_single_layout_feature_cache_ti: 1-1.5h per 35k samples on current P2a-like single-layout cache estimate
layout_candidates.notes: 用于测试局部变化、突变和 patch-level pattern 是否改善 routing。

layout_candidates.input_source: FFT absolute or log energy computed from RevIN-normalized history x
layout_candidates.channel_design: frequency energy profile rendered as ViT-compatible image
layout_candidates.panel_design: frequency profile or heatmap; does not preserve phase
layout_candidates.shortcut_risk: medium-high: frequency distribution may encode dataset shortcut
layout_candidates.estimated_single_layout_feature_cache_ti: 1-1.5h per 35k samples on current P2a-like single-layout cache estimate
layout_candidates.notes: 区别于 top3fold：这是频域统计图，不显式保留周期内局部形状。

layout_candidates.input_source: RevIN-normalized history x with FFT top-3 period candidates
layout_candidates.channel_design: top1/top2/top3 period-folded views in ViT-compatible tensor
layout_candidates.panel_design: period-aware folded spatial layout; current implementation uses channels
layout_candidates.shortcut_risk: medium-high: unstable period estimates or top-k period can become dataset shortcut
layout_candidates.estimated_single_layout_feature_cache_ti: 1-1.5h per 35k samples on current P2a-like single-layout cache estimate
layout_candidates.notes: 保留周期内局部形状，是 FFT energy 的互补 period-aware spatial layout。

layout_candidates.input_source: multiple period candidates and their relative strengths
layout_candidates.channel_design: soft mixture of folded period views, exact weighting deferred
layout_candidates.panel_design: deferred; may mix or panelize multiple period candidates
layout_candidates.shortcut_risk: medium: soft weights reduce hard shortcut but still expose period spectrum
expected_failure_modes: hard to compare with first-round layouts
layout_candidates.estimated_single_layout_feature_cache_ti: deferred; expected near top3fold unless multiple ViT passes are introduced
layout_candidates.notes: 本步只记录，不纳入第一轮默认 feature cache screening。

layout_candidates.input_source: multiple pseudo image views, each independently encoded by frozen ViT
layout_candidates.channel_design: each view encoded separately, embeddings aggregated after ViT
layout_candidates.panel_design: no shared image panel; view separation happens at encoder level
layout_candidates.shortcut_risk: medium: cleaner view separation but changes architecture and compute budget
layout_candidates.estimated_single_layout_feature_cache_ti: not recommended first round; roughly 2-3x if each view passes ViT separately
layout_candidates.notes: 这是架构级候选，不应与第一轮 layout screening 混跑。
